title: cucurbita leucantha
intro: Cucurbita leucantha, also known as the 'White Spurred Gourd' or 'Calabash', is a species of vining plant in the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cucurbita leucantha include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a food source.
